feat.name: Coral Lifeline
feat.text: Your coral symbiotes have grown into your bloodstream and are now curled around your heart. When you would die, the coral in your body releases a burst of healing energy. This prevents you from dying and restores 4d8 Hit Points. Once this ability is used, the coral fades to a dull gray and gives you no benefits until you complete your next daily preparations.

traits.name: Healing
traits.text: A healing effect restores a creature’s body, typically by restoring Hit Points, but sometimes by removing diseases or other debilitating effects.
